task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Odoo interface (e.g., the main apps dashboard) indicating a successful login.
The Odoo Employees app is open, displaying a list, grid, or kanban view of employees.

task_completion.description: Open the profile for employee 'Walter Horton'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed employee profile or form view for 'Walter Horton' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the Manager field to 'Marc Demo'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the employee profile for Walter Horton (typically under the 'Work Information' tab or main form), the 'Manager' field is filled with 'Marc Demo'.

The profile changes are saved, indicated by the absence of unsaved changes warnings, clicking a save icon (cloud with an arrow), or the form appearing in a saved/read-only state with 'Marc Demo' as the manager.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Odoo GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo web interface rather than API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing direct database update commands (e.g., psql) or python scripts modifying the database.

integrity.description: The agent progressively interacted with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression of clicks and navigation through the Odoo UI to reach the objective.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets Odoo 17 HR module at http://localhost:8069 with database 'odoo_hr'. The admin credentials are admin/admin. The employee to be modified is 'Walter Horton' and the new manager to be set is 'Marc Demo'. Both are part of the official Odoo demo data.
